author: Robert Collier
quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.

author: John C. Maxwell
quote: A leader is one who knows the way, goes the way and shows the way.

author: Albert Einstein
quote: Once you stop learning, you start dying.

author: Jim Rohn
quote: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.

author: Helen Keller
quote: Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much.

author: Theodore Roosevelt
quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.

author: Winston Churchill
quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal.

author: Simon Sinek
quote: Leadership is about taking care of those in your charge.

author: Benjamin Franklin
quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.

author: Aristotle
quote: We are what we repeatedly do.

author: Andrew Carnegie
quote: Teamwork is the fuel that allows common people to attain uncommon results.

author: Confucius
quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.

author: Napoleon Hill
quote: Patience, persistence and perspiration make an unbeatable combination.

author: John Quincy Adams
quote: If your actions inspire others to dream more, you are a leader.

author: Nelson Mandela
quote: Education is the most powerful weapon to change the world.

author: Brian Tracy
quote: Successful people are simply those with successful habits.

author: Phil Jackson
quote: The strength of the team is each individual member.

author: Steve Jobs
quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.

author: Vince Lombardi
quote: The price of success is hard work.

author: Mahatma Gandhi
quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
